import React, { useState } from "react"; const Contact = () => { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: "", email: "", message: "", }); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value, }); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const subject = `Portfolio inquiry from ${formData.name}`; const body = `${formData.message}\n\nEmail: ${formData.email}`; const mailtoLink = `mailto:mvasantharaj1972@gmail.com?subject=${encodeURIComponent( subject, )}&body=${encodeURIComponent(body)}`; window.location.href = mailtoLink; setFormData({ name: "", email: "", message: "" }); }; return (

); }; export default Contact;
